data.body: src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child-helpers.ts:181-187 child-close log shows only code= and aborted=, dropping the close-event signal and the runtime.state.exitReason. When the watchdog SIGTERMs a child and the child catches it (exits code=0), the current log is indistinguishable from a genuinely clean finish. Must extend the child close console.log to include: signal (from close event), exitReason (from runtime.state.exitReason — already set to 'timeout'/'result_observed'/etc), msSinceLastStdout (Date.now() minus last stdout/response timestamp tracked in runtime state — add a lastStdoutAt timestamp to SessionRuntimeState if missing), and lastEventType (from runtime.state.lastNormalizedEvent?.type). Apply the same enrichment to the error handler wireTakeChildError and to initial-io's child close at terminal-manager-initial-io.ts:240.
data.title: Enrich child_close log with diagnostics
